mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet (id, name, cover, detail, address, age, gender, pet_type_id, is_vaccine, is_recommend, is_adopt, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{cover}, #{detail}, #{address}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{petTypeId}, #{isVaccine}, #{isRecommend}, #{isAdopt}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.cover, p.detail, p.address, p.age, p.gender, p.pet_type_id, p.is_vaccine, p.is_recommend, p.is_adopt, p.create_time, pt.name AS pet_type_name FROM pet p LEFT JOIN pet_type pt ON pt.id = p.pet_type_id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.cover, p.address, p.age, p.gender, p.pet_type_id, p.is_vaccine, p.is_recommend, p.is_adopt, p.create_time, pt.name AS pet_type_name FROM pet p LEFT JOIN pet_type pt ON pt.id = p.pet_type_id WHERE p.id IN
#{id}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.detail, p.address, p.age, p.gender, p.pet_type_id AS petTypeId, pt.name AS petTypeName, p.is_vaccine AS isVaccine, p.is_adopt AS isAdopt FROM pet p LEFT JOIN pet_type pt ON pt.id = p.pet_type_id

SELECT bucket_name AS name, ROUND(SUM(is_adopt) / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) AS count FROM ( SELECT p.id, IFNULL(p.is_adopt, 0) AS is_adopt, CASE WHEN IFNULL(score_stat.score, 0) >= 10 THEN '高吸引力(10+)' WHEN IFNULL(score_stat.score, 0) BETWEEN 6 AND 9 THEN '较高吸引力(6-9)' WHEN IFNULL(score_stat.score, 0) BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '中等吸引力(3-5)' ELSE '低吸引力(0-2)' END AS bucket_name, CASE WHEN IFNULL(score_stat.score, 0) >= 10 THEN 4 WHEN IFNULL(score_stat.score, 0) BETWEEN 6 AND 9 THEN 3 WHEN IFNULL(score_stat.score, 0) BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS sort_no FROM pet p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT an.content_id, SUM(CASE WHEN an.type = 1 THEN 1 WHEN an.type = 2 THEN 2 WHEN an.type = 3 THEN 3 ELSE 0 END) AS score FROM active_net an WHERE an.content_type = 'PET' GROUP BY an.content_id ) score_stat ON score_stat.content_id = p.id ) attraction_stat GROUP BY bucket_name, sort_no ORDER BY sort_no
